mapper.select: select nf.strresid, nf.cpu_usage, nf.mem_usage, nf.measured_datetime, nm.node_id from rca.tb_nodefactor nf inner join resource.tb_node_mst nm on nm.node_num = nf.strresid where nf.node_id = #{node_id}::int and nf.measured_datetime = to_timestamp(cast(#{measured_datetime} AS int8)/1000)
mapper.update: update rca.tb_nodefactor set ticket_id = #{ticketId} where node_id = #{node_id}::int and measured_datetime = to_timestamp(cast(#{measured_datetime} AS int8)/1000)
